name: tango
description: Desktop app for managing Claude Code sessions

scripts.dev: bun run build:instruments && electrobun build && electrobun dev
scripts.dev:app: TANGO_DISABLE_WATCHER_AUTOSTART=1 bun run build:instruments && TANGO_DISABLE_WATCHER_AUTOSTART=1 electrobun build && TANGO_DISABLE_WATCHER_AUTOSTART=1 electrobun dev
scripts.start: bun run clean && bun run build && bun run dev:raw
scripts.dev:fresh: bun run clean:cache && bun run dev
scripts.clean: bun run kill-app; bun run kill-server; true
